headline: BofA Raises its Price Target on Welltower (WELL)
summary: Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) is one of the 10 Best American Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next Decade. On May 26, 2026, BofA raised the firm’s price target on Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) to $277 from $260 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. BofA updated its models following Q1 earnings from healthcare REITs. […]

headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving on Friday?
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the S&P500 index in the middle of the day on Friday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.
